behavior_summary: This script implements simple inspect/U8P_TALLCAND::use/animation behavior for a candlestick item: when the player 'looks' at the object it shows the single short description 'candlestick'.

The 'U8P_TALLCAND::use' process toggles or cycles the item's visual frame by reading the frame index, testing the low two bits, and either incrementing the frame or clearing those bits—effectively switching the item's visible state.
The 'U8P_TALLCAND::anim' helper invokes a single-frame animation step (METHOD::reverseAnimFrame) to advance or reverse the item's animation.
notable_control_flow: U8P_TALLCAND::look is a process (U8P_TALLCAND::look handler) that immediately emits a bark 'candlestick' and then suspends/ends.
U8P_TALLCAND::use reads the current frame (Item::getFrame), performs a bit test (low 2 bits == 0), and then either Item::setFrame(frame+1) or Item::setFrame(frame & 0xFC) before suspending.
U8P_TALLCAND::anim calls external METHOD::reverseAnimFrame to perform a single-frame animation change and then suspends.
No global flags are read or written by these functions; behavior is local to the item instance ('this').
open_questions: What engine event invokes U8P_TALLCAND::anim (timer, U8P_TALLCAND::use, or external driver)?
Is the low-two-bit encoding in 'U8P_TALLCAND::use' representing a binary toggle, a small multi-state cycle, or an index into a larger state table?
Are there other scripts or systems that coordinate frame changes for this item (e.g., shared animation controllers) beyond the shown calls?

main_function.name: U8P_TALLCAND::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the item's short description when examined by the player; display the text 'candlestick' and then suspend/terminate the U8P_TALLCAND::look process.
entry_conditions: Player inspects/examines the item (U8P_TALLCAND::look verb) or engine invokes the object's U8P_TALLCAND::look process/trigger region entry.

function_map.name: U8P_TALLCAND::look
function_map.role: Examine handler that displays the item's short description ('candlestick').

function_map.name: U8P_TALLCAND::anim
function_map.role: Animation helper that advances/reverses a frame via METHOD::reverseAnimFrame.

function_map.name: U8P_TALLCAND::use
function_map.role: Use handler that manipulates the item's frame index to toggle or cycle its visible state.

external_calls.purpose: Perform a single-frame animation step (reverse or advance the visual frame).
Read the current frame index of this item instance (passed as this).
Write the computed/new frame index back to this item instance after toggling/cycling.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements simple inspect/U8P_TALLCAND::use/animation behavior for a candlestick item: when the player 'looks' at the object it shows the single short description 'candlestick'.
